executives.name: John Ciampaglia
executives.background: Mr. Ciampaglia is the Chief Executive Officer of Sprott Asset Management LP and has been with the firm since 2010. He has over 25 years of experience in the investment industry.

executives.name: Kevin Hibbert
executives.background: Mr. Hibbert is the Chief Financial Officer of Sprott Inc. and has been with the firm since 2014. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

board_of_directors.name: Jack C. Lee
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Lee is the President of Lee-Side Management Ltd. and has extensive experience in the energy and resource sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Barbara Connolly Keady
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Keady is the Director of Research at Ceres Partners and has over 30 years of experience in investment management.

board_of_directors.name: Scott Hicks
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hicks is a corporate director with over 15 years of experience in the resource sector, specifically in corporate finance and M&A.

sources.source_description: Sprott Physical Uranium Trust Official Website and Annual Information Form
